---
title: "The mystery of Sheffield’s steepest hill"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2012). The mystery of Sheffield’s steepest hill. *Now Then*."
date: "2012-02-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_mystery_2012"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Now Then"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Now Then
**Year:** 2012

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2012). The mystery of Sheffield’s steepest hill. *Now Then*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_mystery_2012,
  title = {The Mystery of {{Sheffield}}'s Steepest Hill},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2012},
  month = feb,
  journal = {Now Then},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
